mapper.select: SELECT a.account_id, up.nickname, up.handle, up.hati_code, up.gender, ( SELECT mf.url FROM media_files mf WHERE mf.ref_type = 'PROFILE' AND mf.ref_id = a.account_id AND ROWNUM = 1 ) AS profile_image_url FROM user_follow f JOIN accounts a ON f.dst_account_id = a.account_id JOIN user_profile up ON a.account_id = up.account_id WHERE f.src_account_id = #{myId} AND a.role_type != 'ADMIN' AND a.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY up.nickname ASC
mapper.insert:
SELECT seq_chat_rooms.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO chat_rooms (room_id, room_type, created_at) VALUES (#{roomId}, 'DM', SYSDATE)
INSERT INTO chat_room_members (room_id, account_id, joined_at) VALUES (#{roomId}, #{accountId}, SYSDATE)

SELECT msg_seq.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO chat_messages ( message_id, room_id, sender_account_id, message_type, content ) VALUES ( #{messageId}, #{roomId}, #{senderAccountId}, #{messageType}, #{content} )
mapper.select: SELECT cm.message_id, cm.room_id, cm.sender_account_id, cm.message_type, cm.content, cm.is_deleted, cm.created_at, mf.file_id, mf.account_id, mf.ref_type, mf.ref_id, mf.url, mf.created_at AS file_created_at FROM chat_messages cm LEFT JOIN media_files mf ON cm.message_id = mf.ref_id AND mf.ref_type LIKE 'CHAT_%' WHERE cm.room_id = #{roomId} ORDER BY cm.created_at ASC, cm.message_id ASC

SELECT cr.room_id AS "roomId", cr.room_type AS "roomType", cr.created_at AS "createdAt", other_member.account_id AS "otherAccountId", up.nickname AS "otherNickname", up.hati_code AS "otherHatiCode", up.gender AS "otherGender", ( SELECT mf.url FROM media_files mf WHERE mf.ref_type = 'PROFILE' AND mf.ref_id = other_member.account_id AND ROWNUM = 1 ) AS "otherProfileImageUrl",
CASE WHEN last_msg.is_deleted = 'Y' THEN '삭제된 메시지입니다.' WHEN last_msg.message_type = 'PAYMENT' THEN '결제 요청' ELSE TO_CHAR(last_msg.content) END AS "lastMessage",
last_msg.created_at AS "lastMessageTime", my_member.is_favorite AS "isFavorite", NVL(notif.is_muted, 0) AS "isMuted",
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_messages cm WHERE cm.room_id = cr.room_id AND cm.message_id > NVL(my_member.last_read_message_id, 0) AND cm.sender_account_id != #{myId} ) AS "unreadCount"
FROM chat_rooms cr
JOIN chat_room_members my_member ON cr.room_id = my_member.room_id AND my_member.account_id = #{myId} AND my_member.is_hidden = 'N'
LEFT JOIN chat_room_members other_member ON cr.room_id = other_member.room_id AND other_member.account_id != #{myId}
LEFT JOIN chat_room_notifications notif ON cr.room_id = notif.room_id AND notif.account_id = #{myId}
LEFT JOIN user_profile up ON other_member.account_id = up.account_id
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT room_id, content, created_at, message_id, is_deleted, message_type,
ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY room_id ORDER BY created_at DESC, message_id DESC) AS rn
FROM chat_messages
) last_msg ON cr.room_id = last_msg.room_id AND last_msg.rn = 1
WHERE cr.room_type = 'DM' AND other_member.account_id IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY
my_member.is_favorite DESC,
NVL(last_msg.created_at, cr.created_at) DESC,
NVL(last_msg.message_id, cr.room_id) DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE chat_room_members SET is_favorite = CASE WHEN is_favorite = 'N' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND account_id = #{accountId}

MERGE INTO chat_room_notifications crn USING (SELECT #{roomId} AS room_id, #{accountId} AS account_id FROM DUAL) src ON (crn.room_id = src.room_id AND crn.account_id = src.account_id) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET is_muted = CASE WHEN crn.is_muted = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, updated_at = SYSDATE WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (room_id, account_id, is_muted, updated_at) VALUES (src.room_id, src.account_id, 1, SYSDATE)
UPDATE chat_room_members SET is_hidden = 'N' WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND is_hidden = 'Y'
mapper.select: SELECT mf.url FROM media_files mf WHERE mf.ref_type = 'PROFILE' AND mf.ref_id = #{accountId} AND ROWNUM = 1
